reviews.review_description: Juvenile in every aspect.

A fantastic example of a game made for VR. 
Enjoyable with potential to be be a staple in VR ganeplay.

Adorable art style, comfortable to play,  confidence in moving with out activating gaurdian; all balanced to be immersive in a field of flowers with bees. 

Game play was unexpected; it turned out to be tower defense with resourse management and a flare for VR pen art. All these elemnts blended together to feel cohesive and flow together.

developer_response.body: Hey Strife Monkey, thanks for the detailed review. I've been busy working on my latest game, Call the Wizards - it's a tower defense where you build elemental wizards: https://thaum.co/wizards

reviews.review_description: When I heard about a game with bees I was already excited, I love bees and any game that lets me interact with them ☺️

developer_response.body: Bees are amazing, right! Did you know they dance in the hive to tell others that they found a good place with flowers? I updated the game to put your name on a bee. You should check out my new VR game, "Call the Wizards" - it's a tower defense where you build elemental wizards: https://thaum.co/wizards

reviews.review_description: I love this game, different yet interesting mecanics, and so much little cute creatures. Very recomended for any age, 10 out of 10.

reviews.review_description: This is a pretty fun game.The music is amazing and nice to listen too.The designs for the bees are cute.The game is a pretty fun to play.I would definitely recommend this game to any new vr players or people who experience motion sickness.

reviews.review_description: I absolutely love this game! It's kinda relaxing and intense at the same time. I don't like how long it takes for the bees to follow you and how long it takes to create new bees other than that great game! Oh and btw I want my name on a bee!!

reviews.review_description: I really enjoy this game. Being the queen bee and flying around and guiding other bees to collect pollen is a lot of fun. I love the colors and how simple the game is.

reviews.review_description: I usually don't get into tower defense games too much, but I did enjoy this this one. Hoping to see more.

reviews.review_title: The bees are soo cute! Great game too..
reviews.review_description: The game is fun, can get a little frustrating sometimes but it just adds to the fun. Personally, I love the game. Interesting design and game style. Plus the bees look really cute. Overall, love the game.

developer_response.body: Hi Bunkowo, thanks for the review. Sorry it's a bit frustrating at times. It was my first game, and it's a very unique design, so it was tricky to get the controls right. If you're looking for another cute, challenging game, I think you'd love my new game, "Call the Wizards" - it's a tower defense where you build elemental wizards: https://thaum.co/wizards
